name: @soltrade/signing-adapter-contract
description: Signing Adapter CONTRACT + NO-OP adapter (Gate E / E2-C1): interface/contract describing a signing adapter that consumes an already-validated preflight result + an opaque custody handle and is fail-closed, plus a no-op adapter that never signs. NO live calls. No crypto/signing library; no KMS/vault; no KeyManager; no key material; no transaction building/serialization; no signing/sending; no RPC/provider; no DB; no REAL-LIVE; no execution authority. OUTSIDE the mechanism guard's allowlist and fully scanned.
